page.title: APN Settings
page.description: Set the APN, IP protocol, and data context your SIM uses to connect.

card.title: APN Configuration
card.description: The Access Point Name the modem uses to establish a data connection.

apn.save_connection_notice: Saving briefly drops the cellular connection while the modem reconnects.

dialog.title: Use carrier default APN?
dialog.description: Your carrier will choose the APN automatically. The cellular connection will drop briefly while the modem reconnects.

toast.deactivate_error: Failed to revert to carrier default

live.mismatch_default: Network is using the carrier default

cid_confirm.title: Use a reserved context?
cid_confirm.description_ims: CID {{cid}} is reserved by your carrier for IMS (VoLTE / Wi-Fi calling). Writing a data APN here can disrupt voice calling. Continue anyway?
cid_confirm.description_sos: CID {{cid}} is reserved for emergency (SOS) calling. Writing a data APN here can disrupt emergency calls. Continue anyway?

form.mno_hint: You may select pre-configured mobile network operators here.
form.default_scenario_hint: Runs whenever no schedule window is active.
form.schedule_inline_hint: Switch scenario inside up to two daily windows.
form.windows_empty: No windows yet. Add one to switch scenario at a set time.

scenario.overlap_warning: This window overlaps another. When windows overlap, the topmost one wins.
scenario.schedule_invalid: Fix the highlighted schedule entries before saving.

block_errors.zero_length: Start and end times must differ.
